name: John Hickenlooper
subject: COnservation: A plan to protect our outdoors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
Folks --

We are at a crucial moment for protecting our land, water, and air -- so much of what makes Colorado special.

Washington is bulldozing through our national monuments, carving up our public lands, and auctioning them off to the highest-bidding special interests. The Trump Administration is rolling back key environmental protections. And Washington Republicans, like my opponent Cory Gardner, refuse to act on climate change.

As a Coloradan, I am fed up. Not only do these reckless policies threaten our public lands and wild spaces, they threaten hundreds of thousands of jobs and billions of dollars that outdoor recreation contributes to our economy.

Today, I'm releasing an aggressive policy agenda to protect our outdoors. If you agree we need to prioritize conservation now to protect the Colorado we love, please sign on to my plan here.

https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-your-name-in-support-of-john-s-plan-to-protect-our-outdoors

Washington needs a bold plan to promote our outdoor economy while conserving our natural spaces.

My plan includes:

+ Enhancing America's outdoor recreational experiences by opposing selling off federal lands, addressing the maintenance backlog of the national parks, fully funding the Land and Water Conservation Fund, and expanding access to federal lands to increase equity in outdoors access for low-income individuals and people of color.

+ Promoting the outdoor industry in Colorado and across the country by prioritizing passing the CORE Act -- which would protect 400,000 acres of Colorado's public lands, including Thompson Divide and Camp Hale -- and other legislation that would protect our public lands, ending the reckless trade wars, and establishing a National Recreation Office to promote outdoor recreation on federal lands, create jobs, diversify rural economies, and provide physical and mental benefits to us all.

+ Addressing today's most pressing conservation challenges by protecting rare and endangered species, supporting efforts to improve our resilience to climate change, and mapping and conserving wildlife corridors.

Our outdoor economy and Colorado way of life depend on us being good stewards of the environment. We have an obligation to leave public lands better off for future generations.

I want to lead on this issue in Washington. We can bring people together -- industry leaders, environmentalists, businesspeople, federal and state officials, hunters, anglers, skiers, rafters, cyclists, and more -- to protect our outdoors and promote our economy.

Please take action now and support my plan today.

ADD YOUR NAME: https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-your-name-in-support-of-john-s-plan-to-protect-our-outdoors

Thank you.

-- John
-------

Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218

Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.

If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by signing up right here: https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up

We love staying connected to you—and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you’d like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe here: https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe. If you'd like to receive only the most important campaign updates, click here: https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/id-like-to-get-less-email.

If we’re not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information here: https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up

name: Booker HQ
subject: Can we raise $250,000 by February 20th?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate
body:
| | |
---
| We're betting that we can. Team, It's hard to believe that it's been almost a month now since we launched Cory's Senate re-election campaign. Since then, we've been focused on scaling up our operation -- that's why your dedication to this race is so important. We're off to a great start, but now let's see if we can take it to the next level. _**We want to know if we can raise $250,000 by February 20th at 11:59 p.m.**_ **It 's an ambitious goal to say the least, but the truth is that Cory already has five Republicans running against him -- with more potentially on the way. Are you able to chip in immediately towards our goal?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200210_BHQ_20200210-fr-BHQ-EM1-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")

---

One of the realities of campaigning for office is the constant need to raise money and never let up. That's particularly true in this race, where we may have to contend with special interests and dark money groups that don't have to disclose their donors. It's important that we're ready for whatever comes our way.
**[Remember, we don't accept a dime in contributions from federal lobbyists, corporate PACs, or fossil fuel and pharma execs. That's why we count on grassroots supporters like you to power our campaign.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200210_BHQ_20200210-fr-BHQ-EM1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
We're not expecting this to be easy. It'll truly take all hands on deck to reach $250,000 by February 20th. **But, we 're feeling good -- because this team has never let us down before.**
We can do this.
Let's go,
Team Cory
_P.S. We also revamped our website if you haven 't checked it out yet. Head on over to **[corybooker.com](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fb8/5fca0d19/7a19e2fa/291d0c7b/1255380408/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/")** to take a look. You also may have noticed our brand new logo at the top of our emails. :)_
[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200210_BHQ_20200210-fr-BHQ-EM1-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

| | Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate.
---

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fb8/5fca0d19/7a19e2fa/291d0c79/1255380408/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fb8/5fca0d19/7a19e2fa/291d0c78/1255380408/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fb8/5fca0d19/7a19e2fa/291d0c47/1255380408/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fb8/5fca0d19/7a19e2fa/291d0c46/1255380408/VEsHBg/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/unsubscribe").

name: Wendy Davis
subject: On Donald Trump's budget:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
body:
Trillions in handouts for the wealthy, trillions in cuts for the most vulnerable
| | | [](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-2020_survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk24-su-nd")
---
Friend,

The president released his proposed budget this morning, and here's what I'm seeing: Billionaires getting trillions of dollars in handouts and less fortunate families getting more barriers to medical care, housing, education, and even basic essentials like food. On top of that, in the midst of a climate crisis that's only growing more severe, the president recommends a 26% cut to the Environmental Protection Agency.
I'm overwhelmed by how many vulnerable Americans the president's budget could leave behind. I can't help but think back to my childhood - to times when my siblings, single mom and I didn't have a whole lot except one another. And to my own days spent as a struggling undereducated single mom. It was so hard to keep a roof over our heads and food on the table. It's the same kind of work ethic I've seen from thousands of Texas families I've met.
But under President Trump's budget, it could be even harder for some of those families to make ends meet. Meanwhile, the president's tax cuts - which numerous reports have shown benefit the wealthiest in our country - will be continued to the tune of $1.4 trillion.
Trillions in handouts for the wealthiest, trillions in cuts for the most vulnerable. That's the vision the president has set out for our country - and it's a vision I have no doubt my opponent, Chip Roy, will rubber-stamp with his approval. But today, I want you to make your voice heard on this budget proposal.
**In times like these, we need to speak out for the kind of country we want to build - the kind of country we want to leave behind for our grandchildren. So I've set a goal to hear from 385 supporters, including you, before midnight. Tell me:**
| | **Do you support the president 's budget proposal?**
---
| | | [YES](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-2020_survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk24-su-nd")
---
| [NO](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-2020_survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk24-su-nd")
---
In an election as important as this one, we can't stay quiet in moments like this. Thank you so much for joining me in speaking out.

Wendy
| If you'd like to support Wendy Davis for Congress, you can **[click here to make a donation](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361a25/704929dc/162d49ed/3993bfc2/4011222570/VEsC/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wd4c_emailfooter")**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361a25/704929dc/162d49ed/3993bfc5/4011222570/VEsD/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fewer-emails"). [To unsubscribe from the Wendy Davis for Congress email list, please click here.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361a25/704929dc/162d49ed/3993bfc4/4011222570/VEsA/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe") Wendy Davis for Congress
3112 Windsor Rd. Ste A #525
Austin, TX 78703 | Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
---

name: Democratic Response
subject: Do you support raising the minimum wage?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | |
---
Team: Democratic governors - like Pennsylvania's Tom Wolf, Louisiana's John Bel Edwards and North Carolina's Roy Cooper - are pushing to raise the minimum wage in states across the country. They know that $7.25 an hour is not even close to a living wage.**But Republicans are doing everything they can to block their efforts.**
In his State of the Union address, Donald Trump claimed that our economy is the best it has ever been. **But Republicans on the state and federal levels have put the priorities of CEOs and corporations over working people.** Trump and Mitch McConnell have promised to block ANY measure to increase the minimum wage, even as corporate profits are skyrocketing and wages have stagnated for millions of hardworking Americans.
**Democrats must stop Republicans from sacrificing the wellbeing of American workers**** - so we're asking Democrats in FL**** ****to take a stand with us.** We're counting on 149 more Democrats to demand Congress raise the minimum wage, and we're still waiting to hear from you. Tell us:
| | **11:59 P.M. DEADLINE**
---
**Do you support raising the minimum wage?**
---

clean_body: | | | Team: Democratic governors - like Pennsylvania's Tom Wolf, Louisiana's John Bel Edwards and North Carolina's Roy Cooper - are pushing to raise the minimum wage in states across the country. They know that $7.25 an hour is not even close to a living wage.But Republicans are doing everything they can to block their efforts. In his State of the Union address, Donald Trump claimed that our economy is the best it has ever been. But Republicans on the state and federal levels have put the priorities of CEOs and corporations over working people. Trump and Mitch McConnell have promised to block ANY measure to increase the minimum wage, even as corporate profits are skyrocketing and wages have stagnated for millions of hardworking Americans. Democrats must stop Republicans from sacrificing the wellbeing of American workers - so we're asking Democrats in FL to take a stand with us. We're counting on 149 more Democrats to demand Congress raise the minimum wage, and we're still waiting to hear from you. Tell us: | | 11:59 P.M. DEADLINE Do you support raising the minimum wage? | | | | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To unsubscribe from the DGA email list, . | | Paid for by Democratic Governors Association. name: Andrew Yang
subject: I have to ask you to contribute one last time toward our $2 million goal so we can hit it by midnight tonight. We’re still $956,073 away and without your help we have no chance of hitting it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=7369%2E377263%2E702uC7) Yang Gang, what you do now will determine the future of this Humanity First movement.

Tomorrow is the New Hampshire primary, a test of our campaign. And we need every resource possible to secure a top finish if we’re going to have the momentum to win the nomination.

**I have to ask you to contribute one last time toward our $2 million goal so we can hit it by midnight tonight. We’re still $956,073 away, and without your help we have no chance of hitting it.

[Rush $10 or more now, before it’s too late. Your contribution now puts us in a position to perform well in New Hampshire tomorrow, go strong into Super Tuesday, and take on Trump in November.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/25129?t=5&akid=7369%2E377263%2E702uC7)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/25129?t=6&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=7369%2E377263%2E702uC7)

name: James Carville
subject: Need $5 to beat Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team,

I don't know about you, but to me, it feels like Democrats have lost our damn minds!

[Donald Trump faced the biggest midterm loss in history - he's weak right now, and we've got to go on the offense here. What Democrats need in order to win the long game is power! Do you understand? That's what this is about, team.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaaa8/134673f2/370d74bd/699734f3/1246189411/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B4_021020_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[I endorsed Michael Bennet because he's not an ideologue or a socialist - he's a battle-tested Democrat who knows how to win hard races in swing states. Chip in right now, and he'll do more than win in New Hampshire - he'll beat Donald Trump:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaaa8/134673f2/370d74bd/699734f3/1246189411/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B4_021020_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[This vote is just the beginning for Michael - if he's the nominee, you'll have unmatched party unity. We can win crucial states like North Carolina, Georgia, and Texas.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaaa8/134673f2/370d74bd/699734f3/1246189411/VEsO/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B4_021020_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Listen, Trump went to Davos talking about cutting Medicare! Are you kidding me!?

He's the first president to rip healthcare away from millions of people. He's gutting school funding. He's racking up a massive debt. It's despicable, and I can't take four more years of it, team.

But we won't beat Trump by running down leftist rabbit holes!

[Michael's not wasting time shouting on Twitter - he's listening to real people, he's building a coalition, and he's got a message that resonates with voters across the country.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaaa8/134673f2/370d74bd/699734f3/1246189411/VEsP/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B4_021020_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[I'm confident that Michael Bennet is the candidate to beat Trump! Chipping in $5 or more ahead of tomorrow's New Hampshire primary will help us put an end to the Trump administration for good, team. clean_body: | | | Team, I don't know about you, but to me, it feels like Democrats have lost our damn minds! "" "" | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" "" Listen, Trump went to Davos talking about cutting Medicare! Are you kidding me!? He's the first president to rip healthcare away from millions of people. He's gutting school funding. He's racking up a massive debt. It's despicable, and I can't take four more years of it, team. But we won't beat Trump by running down leftist rabbit holes! "" "" | | "" You can curse the darkness or you can light a candle. I'm getting a welding torch, alright? Let's do this, - James | | Paid for by Bennet for America Contributions or gifts to Bennet for America are not tax deductible.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bret=20Richards?=
subject: 🙌 THANK YOU
body:
Thankful for the dozens of surrogates and supporters who spoke on behalf of our campaign on caucus night. Let's take this momentum to the next level!

http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=6a0b9d0638-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-6a0b9d0638-25822489
https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=6a0b9d0638-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-6a0b9d0638-25822489
https://www.facebook.com/BretRichards4Congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=6a0b9d0638-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-6a0b9d0638-25822489
https://twitter.com/Richards4Iowa?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=6a0b9d0638-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-6a0b9d0638-25822489
https://www.instagram.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=6a0b9d0638-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-6a0b9d0638-25822489
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCWoK8_dK_O4JOjCtLkZKF9w?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=6a0b9d0638-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-6a0b9d0638-25822489
http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=6a0b9d0638-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-6a0b9d0638-25822489
Hello

Thank you for the amazing support our campaign received on Monday night. I spoke at the Ames caucus, where none other than Donald Trump Jr. warmed up the crowd. There must have been 450 or more people there to cast their vote for President Trump.

There was HUGE turnout all across Iowa for President Trump's re-election and our message resonated in every corner of the district.

Time and again I'm encouraged by the tremendous volunteers who are powering our grassroots campaign to victory. And now our campaign is kicking it into high gear.

We MUST keep this seat red by sending a conservative outsider to Congress. Every second that you help out with our cause counts. How do YOU plan to get involved?
HOST A GATHERING (http://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=6a0b9d0638-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-6a0b9d0638-25822489)
KNOCK DOORS (http://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=6a0b9d0638-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-6a0b9d0638-25822489)
LIKE US ON FACEBOOK (http://facebook.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=6a0b9d0638-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-6a0b9d0638-25822489)
PUT UP A SIGN (http://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=6a0b9d0638-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-6a0b9d0638-25822489)
As always, get in touch with me at bret@richardsforcongress.com (mailto:bret@richardsforcongress.com) or (712)-579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign. I look forward to hearing from you.

Please read on to see what I've been up to this week and all of the things we will accomplish together in the coming months.

I appreciate your continued support.

Your neighbor,
p.s. 113 DAYS until the primary on June 2nd. We NEED your support (http://richardsforcongress.com/contribution?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=6a0b9d0638-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-6a0b9d0638-25822489) today!
BUILDING OUR NETWORK

Great to be with the Pocahontas County GOP (https://www.facebook.com/Pocahont%C3%A0s-County-IA-GOP-1458013361180371/?__tn__=K-R&eid=ARBK82cXoHEcTcmo-irzZuMwIijJ7XZAq5-JbrXKooPabUMjw6i9aPmoiEhclCCSf1NkwHnuhgpIKIA3&fref=mentions&__xts__%5B0%5D=68.ARA5T_kBUeZ8D8d2JW5m2UQ5KZVtQo0qcON7l7lyw2Ly7t9BqiSj_nEQfcibsTO-TDrlCAqatKFWjyh1kMG2yu5JzvJ3B0LgbKm0ozWOQ_7MIoK4Y11O5nXmgcPDVJyoM4OXjpKXQ--AtNlwnyHG9qimVLGQgaqpQZlNZTUVhZAgo4gU5mUcqVjf8evuJD2YcMCiuskj5I5y4bmDZqyBlE11iq5idr5K2V-ZfIvFBpbGTZPmwvlTIJHcTQio8BmMQZG9TyyzWG0TEbgMurueWlvuxYDM2viFtZCEIpsn8twYTBcs0wWh_CTJBxR-iXhwJoS7B2LuP7GQU4BkZV61UF-bVfj2&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=6a0b9d0638-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-6a0b9d0638-25822489) at their pancake breakfast in Pocahontas. Appreciate hearing from conservatives in the room who understand that when the government says you don't need an AR-15, that's when you need one.

It was an honor to be represented at the caucuses by dozens of surrogates and supporters across this district rising up and speaking to their neighbors about our campaign. HUGE crowds fired up to re-elect President Trump! Let's take this grassroots energy all the way to June 2!

RECENT COVERAGE

https://www.dbrnews.com/opinion/richards-tired-of-career-politicians-talks-about-term-limits-during/article_4f082334-49fd-11ea-bffe-4fa523a84cd4.html?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=6a0b9d0638-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-6a0b9d0638-25822489
“In the Army, my job was to lead others to a common objective. In the family business, that was about creating opportunity in rural America, working together, listening to the community and serving the public. Can you think of any place that needs those skills more than our dysfunctional federal government?”
UP NEXT

Looking forward to building on our momentum and connecting with more conservatives across Iowa. I'll be visiting with more young conservatives this week and attending a house party in Sioux Center with strong support.

STAY INFORMED
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PyVqQEvzX0E&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=6a0b9d0638-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-6a0b9d0638-25822489

On the issues:
* Protecting Life (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AKFcqll_hko&t=94s&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=6a0b9d0638-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-6a0b9d0638-25822489)
* Lowering Healthcare Costs (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VKawyHECZVI&t=5s&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=6a0b9d0638-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-6a0b9d0638-25822489)
* Securing the Border (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2feYd5WAXtU&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=6a0b9d0638-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-6a0b9d0638-25822489)
* Sticking up for Iowa Energy (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=w1HB4hYMDUQ&t=1s&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=6a0b9d0638-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-6a0b9d0638-25822489)
* and much more... (https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLg6ycE8yzCF0tZeOk5rwVMemYssZoNXHy&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=6a0b9d0638-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-6a0b9d0638-25822489)

GET INVOLVED

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=O5xPeOhUV0U&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=6a0b9d0638-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-6a0b9d0638-25822489
BARN SIGNS ARE AVAILABLE NOW! EMAIL INFO@RICHARDSFORCONGRESS.COM (mailto:info@richardsforcongress.com) TO GET YOURS TODAY!

We can't let this election be determined by Washington or Des Moines insiders. Send your neighbor to Congress instead! Even if you're unable to donate (http://richardsforcongress.com/contribution?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=6a0b9d0638-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-6a0b9d0638-25822489) we still need your help!

Serve as a neighborhood team captain? Know a good place for a barn sign? Send an email to volunteer@richardsforcongress.com (https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=5ebbc50553&e=10eff4eed0&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=6a0b9d0638-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-6a0b9d0638-25822489) to lend a hand!

Be sure to like us on Facebook (http://facebook.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=6a0b9d0638-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-6a0b9d0638-25822489) and follow us on Twitter (http://twitter.com/richards4iowa?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=6a0b9d0638-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-6a0b9d0638-25822489) and Instagram (http://instagram.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=6a0b9d0638-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-6a0b9d0638-25822489) to stay up to date!

name: Dr. Manny Sethi
subject: Check-Up with Dr. Manny 2/10
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr Manny for U
body:
---
| |
---|---|---
| Happy Monday!, Last week was a great week on the campaign trail. I have been criss-crossing the state, making stops in Montgomery County, Hamilton County, Lawrence County, Davidson County, and Madison County to wrap up the busy week. In addition to making stops across the state, we rolled out my new campaign RV. I will be taking this RV from Mountain City to Memphis, from Tiptonville to Turtletown, and everywhere in between. Maya and I are excited to have a little extra legroom for the next 6 months! [Click the link to check it out!](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhjtuyll-uunkhiuw-y/) Finally, I need your help! I picked up the paperwork to be on the ballot for U.S. Senate. I am running as the conservative outsider to represent Tennessee values in Washington. Sign your name and get me on the ballot in August! [Sign the Petition!](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhjtuyll-uunkhiuw-j/) **News:** Last week the Tennessean came out to my "A Different Kind of Difference" campaign stop in Clarksville. [Read the article here!](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhjtuyll-uunkhiuw-t/) Additionally, read about our campaign stop in Hawkins County from the Rogersville Review! I thoroughly enjoyed coming back to Rogersville and meeting strong conservatives. [Read about it here!](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhjtuyll-uunkhiuw-i/) **Social Media:** My "Different Kind of Difference" tour made a stop in Lawrence County last Thursday. It was right here in Lawrence County that Senator Fred Thompson, a man I supported for President in 2008, rolled out his red pickup truck. Because of my admiration for Senator Thompson, I decided to roll out my own vehicle; except it's a big orange bus! Thank you to my friends Mayor Blake Lay and County Mayor TR Williams for coming to our event! Follow us on [Facebook](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhjtuyll-uunkhiuw-d/), [Twitter](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhjtuyll-uunkhiuw-h/), and [Instagram](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhjtuyll-uunkhiuw-k/)! Also be sure to tag us on social media for your chance to be featured in our next Check-Up with Dr. Manny. We have just over 6 months until the primary election. I can't do this without your support. Together we can make a different kind of difference! Dr. Manny P.S. [W](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhjtuyll-uunkhiuw-u/)[o](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhjtuyll-uunkhiuw-o/)[uld you consider chipping in? We can't do this without you, and every donation helps! ](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhjtuyll-uunkhiuw-b/) [Donate](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhjtuyll-uunkhiuw-n/) |
| |
| |
---|---|---
| | [](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhjtuyll-uunkhiuw-p/)
[](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhjtuyll-uunkhiuw-x/) [](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhjtuyll-uunkhiuw-m/) [](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhjtuyll-uunkhiuw-c/)
---

| Paid for by Dr Manny for U.S. Senate |

name: Lyndon Carlson
subject: After 48 years...
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/GC1-DLDBWm9Xv1lZwbQIKFTd7Blk2s0fModMUiDop3c=/3cDTuF1zCY2Ag8IthY4kptg8HFY4o9UJzCoUgP9Qc2g=?refcode=021120) | | Friend - After 48 years and 24 terms in the Minnesota House, today is my last first day of session - and I've loved (almost) every minute of it. What I've learned over my years of public service is that the fortitude and spirit of our great state is unwavering. As the longest-serving state representative in Minnesota history, I am looking forward to how Speaker Hortman and our new generation of legislators take us into the future. I have a challenge for you: would you consider donating $48, one dollar for each year I served, to help preserve and defend our House DFL Majority this fall? **[Donate Now: $48->](https://act.myngp.com/el/GC1-DLDBWm9Xv1lZwbQIKFTd7Blk2s0fModMUiDop3c=/3cDTuF1zCY2Ag8IthY4kptg8HFY4o9UJzCoUgP9Qc2g=?refcode=021120&amount=48)** Your first $50 (or $100 per couple) is fully refundable each year through the Minnesota Political Campaign Refund Program. The future of our state and our legislature is bright. Thank you for the many years of service and trust to build a better Minnesota. I am forever grateful, Rep. Lyndon Carlson Ways and Means, Chair Minnesota House of Representatives

clean_body: | | Friend - After 48 years and 24 terms in the Minnesota House, today is my last first day of session - and I've loved (almost) every minute of it. What I've learned over my years of public service is that the fortitude and spirit of our great state is unwavering. As the longest-serving state representative in Minnesota history, I am looking forward to how Speaker Hortman and our new generation of legislators take us into the future. I have a challenge for you: would you consider donating $48, one dollar for each year I served, to help preserve and defend our House DFL Majority this fall? Your first $50 (or $100 per couple) is fully refundable each year through the Minnesota Political Campaign Refund Program. The future of our state and our legislature is bright. Thank you for the many years of service and trust to build a better Minnesota. I am forever grateful, Rep. body:
Friends- Over the weekend Bill de Blasio called the crime spike that has surged since the new no-bail policy took effect an “extraordinary jump”, and the Post called it a “crime surge”. Since January, New York City has seen a nearly 40% increase in shooting victims and a rise in most major crimes according to official NYPD statistics. Auto thefts have increased 70%. Talk about going back to the 1970s and 80s.

Over the weekend Bill de Blasio called the crime spike that has surged since the new no-bail policy took effect an "extraordinary jump", and the Post called it a "crime surge".

Since January, New York City has seen a nearly 40% increase in shooting victims and a rise in most major crimes according to official NYPD statistics. Auto thefts have increased 70%. Talk about going back to the 1970s and 80s.

This dangerous no-bail policy is exactly the sort of radical agenda liberals are trying to bring to our entire country and to lock in to federal law. Bernie Sanders even said it in Friday’s debate. We CANNOT let that happen.

I need your help. We have to take back Congress \- and I cannot believe it has gotten even this far - to literally prevent dangerous criminals from being released into our communities.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14888767/156598429/464986751?refcode=em_fr_2020.02.11_b1_te_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWI3M2EyOC1mMzRjLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B3HMtSLW1rcUfTByV83cDHNDg_dbG4DB87gCRmN0dYA=) Team,

Last week, President Trump stood at the White House and congratulated Scott Perry on the wonderful job he is doing, which leaves a lot of Pennsylvanians wondering why he deserves congratulations. What exactly has he done? ❓ Voting to strip health care from millions of Americans
❓ Spending his time in Congress promoting a far-right agenda
❓ Earning the support of the Koch network and dark money groups who will try to buy his seat in Congress [**Let’s show Scott Perry’s Washington allies that he has nothing to be applauded for -- chip in to help send Eugene to Congress and restore real leadership to PA-10.** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14888768/156598430/464986751?refcode=em_fr_2020.02.11_b1_te_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWI3M2EyOC1mMzRjLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B3HMtSLW1rcUfTByV83cDHNDg_dbG4DB87gCRmN0dYA=)
[Donate Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14888769/156598431/464986751?refcode=em_fr_2020.02.11_b1_te_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWI3M2EyOC1mMzRjLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B3HMtSLW1rcUfTByV83cDHNDg_dbG4DB87gCRmN0dYA=)
There’s a reason people like Trump, Mike Pence, and Betsy DeVos are rushing to prop up Scott Perry, and it’s because they know that South Central Pennsylvanians are tired of his absent leadership and support of a radical agenda.

Eugene cares deeply about this community.**As Auditor General, he has worked tirelessly to better the lives of people across Pennsylvania and wants to take that fight to Congress.** That means fighting for access to affordable health care, investing in our infrastructure, and building an economy that works for everyone.

[**Let’s send Scott Perry, Donald Trump, and their Washington allies a strong message by sending a proven leader like Eugene to Congress in November.** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14888770/156598432/464986751?refcode=em_fr_2020.02.11_b1_te_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWI3M2EyOC1mMzRjLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B3HMtSLW1rcUfTByV83cDHNDg_dbG4DB87gCRmN0dYA=)

clean_body: = Team, Last week, President Trump stood at the White House and congratulated Scott Perry on the wonderful job he is doing, which leaves a lot of Pennsylvanians wondering why he deserves congratulations. What exactly has he done? ❓ Voting to strip health care from millions of Americans ❓ Spending his time in Congress promoting a far-right agenda ❓ Earning the support of the Koch network and dark money groups who will try to buy his seat in Congress = = There’s a reason people like Trump, Mike Pence, and Betsy DeVos are rushing to prop up Scott Perry, and it’s because they know that South Central Pennsylvanians are tired of his absent leadership and support of a radical agenda. Eugene cares deeply about this community.As Auditor General, he has worked tirelessly to better the lives of people across Pennsylvania and wants to take that fight to Congress. That means fighting for access to affordable health care, investing in our infrastructure, and building an economy that works for everyone. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thanks for your support, Team Eugene Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates: Eugene DePasquale is running to represent Pennsylvania's 10th Congressional District. subject: Will you help preserve our conservative values?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ffaaa108917c/will-you-help-preserve-our-conservative-values?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| | Hi ,

Just one week from today, **your vote gets to be your voice**.

Your vote is your voice for building the wall.

Your vote is your voice for national security.

Your vote is your voice for pro-life policies.

Your vote is your voice for a strong economy.

Your vote is your voice for the Constitution.

The list of issues at stake in this election goes on and on.

**Early voting starts ONE WEEK FROM TODAY!**

Will you pledge to send me to Washington D.C. as your next Congressman for CD-22?
---
|
---
| [Yes! I want you in Congress to help President Trump pass his agenda!](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=1999840486&e=01c99b7fbd "Yes! I want you in Congress to help President Trump pass his agenda!")
---
| The Democrats tried to un-do the 2016 election because they are still writhing in disgust that you and I elected Donald Trump as our President. They thought a claim of Russian collusion would be President Trump’s downfall. They thought a sham impeachment would destroy President Trump. They have stacked the deep state with Obama holdovers.

They have been nothing but wrong!

Let’s continue to prove them wrong by having **you and every one of your conservative friends show up to the polls** for the Republican Primary Election – early voting starts in **ONE WEEK**.

[**If you vote early, you can vote at any one of the voting locations listed here on my website.**](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=6b1203dc21&e=01c99b7fbd)

Post on your social media and let your friends and family know you’re voting early to #KeepAmericaGreat and send me to Washington D.C.!

I’ll be working the polls every day during early voting, from February 18 through February 28.

Will I see you at the polls?!

God bless America. God bless Texas. God bless you.

Kathaleen Wall

---
| [Contribute](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=ab7f2b48ce&e=01c99b7fbd "Contribute")

Friend,

This week marks a critical time for our campaign: **the mid-point of the first FEC fundraising quarter of 2020.**

The Trump administration just released its budget proposal, and it underscores just how important it is that we win Georgia and a Democratic Senate majority. Trump’s budget includes **$2 trillion in cuts to Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security.**

Donald Trump lied about protecting these programs in his campaign for president, and David Perdue lied when he said the Trump tax scam would pay for itself.

They knew their tax giveaway to their wealthy campaign donors would blow a trillion-dollar hole in the deficit, **and they’ve been planning to cut the social safety net to pay for it ever since.**

[**We have to stay on target for the mid-quarter FEC deadline. name: Greg Stanton
subject: it's time to put politics aside and take REAL ACTION
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
**For years, politics-as-usual has gotten in the way of the real, urgent action we desperately need to take to confront climate change. **

That's why I'm excited to share that I am teaming up with my colleagues in the New Democrat Coalition to announce our bold plan to bring leaders together from both sides of the aisle to finally enact real solutions to address climate change.

[**SIGN ON if you believe it 's time to put politics aside and take real action on the climate crisis »**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ib4OAhNZrr90XDxN8wq9qY7CbPdwqt-T4QfadLPPZGU=/GHDt9bRN_-m777FXeePIM-wwiOVmPsOc3lmdSgb6R2I=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ib4OAhNZrr90XDxN8wq9qY7CbPdwqt-T4QfadLPPZGU=/GHDt9bRN_-m777FXeePIM-wwiOVmPsOc3lmdSgb6R2I=)

Our new plan calls for many bold actions, including a significant investment in sustainable infrastructure, a re-commitment to the Paris Climate Agreement, and setting a price on carbon emissions.

**Our climate crisis is an _existential threat_ to our planet. We need to put politics aside and take action before it is too late!**

[**Support commonsense proposals to address climate change | SIGN ON »**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ib4OAhNZrr90XDxN8wq9qY7CbPdwqt-T4QfadLPPZGU=/GHDt9bRN_-m777FXeePIM-wwiOVmPsOc3lmdSgb6R2I=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ib4OAhNZrr90XDxN8wq9qY7CbPdwqt-T4QfadLPPZGU=/GHDt9bRN_-m777FXeePIM-wwiOVmPsOc3lmdSgb6R2I=)

Thank you for taking action to protect our planet,

\-- _ Greg_

Paid for by Stanton for Congress

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Fighting from the heart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
I want to do a good job for all of the people who are getting crushed by costs that are getting heavier and heavier -- health care, housing, you name it. For all of the people who are stretching... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852aef2/45c30650/1f9a20aca/66e2968a/670823297/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
I'm not a career politician. I never in a zillion years thought I'd run for office.

I planned to spend my whole career teaching and researching.

But when I saw how the middle class is being hollowed out, and how working people are getting the short end of the stick, I knew I had to get into this fight.

And in the past year out on the campaign trail, I've seen how the most urgent issues we face as a country are the same issues I've spent decades working on: how we build a country that works for everyone, not just the rich and powerful.

**So I'm fighting from the heart as something I never thought I'd be: as a candidate for president of the United States.**

[**I truly believe that we can build a better America together. It's going to take all of us, but we can get this done. If you're in this fight all the way, and if you can make a donation before tonight's big New Hampshire primary, please chip in $2 or whatever makes sense for you.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852aef2/45c30650/1f9a20aca/66e2968e/670823297/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItbWFyY2gzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU81OEZfRUdSX0VXRF9FXzIwMjAwMjExX1YxUzJfUF9UMSJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-march3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO58F_EGR_EWD_E_20200211_V1S2_P_T1") | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

>
Together, we're fighting to make a huge difference in the lives of tens of millions of people -- by expanding Social Security by $200 a month, guaranteeing Universal Child Care, making sure every kid can go to a great public school, and so much more.

So every time I'm out talking with people about our plans for big, structural change, I'm thinking about how much I want to do a good job for you.

And I want to do a good job for all of the people who are getting crushed by costs that are getting heavier and heavier -- health care, housing, you name it. For all of the people who are stretching to make ends meet on Social Security. For all of the people Washington doesn't listen to -- all the people whose voices are drowned out by lobbyists and ignored by career politicians.

**We can end Washington corruption, rebuild the middle class, and strengthen our democracy if we just come together, get out there, and fight for it.**

[**So I'm asking: Will you pitch into our campaign at this powerfully important moment?**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852aef2/45c30650/1f9a20aca/66e2968e/670823297/VEsEDA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItbWFyY2gzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU81OEZfRUdSX0VXRF9FXzIwMjAwMjExX1YxUzJfUF9UMSJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-march3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO58F_EGR_EWD_E_20200211_V1S2_P_T1")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

name: Team Mark Warner
subject: Derek -- will you help overturn Citizens United?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
It's time to get dark money out of our elections.
|
---
| | Derek --

Ten years ago last month, the Supreme Court ruled on _Citizens United_ , allowing unlimited, anonymous money to be spent in our elections.

To be blunt: this ruling hamstrung our democratic process. That's why Mark is working hard in the Senate to pass a constitutional amendment to reverse the _Citizens United_ decision and to keep corporations and special interests from buying an outsized voice in our democracy.

**[Will you join Mark and call for a constitutional amendment to overturn _Citizens United_?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d636/53d9897e/536fd0b2/1c89b428/835866485/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/OverturnCitizensUnited/?code=Warner")**

It's time to stop corporations and the wealthiest Americans from spending unlimited amounts of dark money to support Republican candidates who will defend their interests, instead of ours. It's going to take a constitutional amendment to make that happen. **[We need your help to make a real change.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d636/53d9897e/536fd0b2/1c89b428/835866485/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/OverturnCitizensUnited/?code=Warner")**

The _Citizens United_ ruling gave special interests and billionaires unparalleled access to influence everyday, working Americans -- and to sway our elections. Overturning this decision would be a major step towards getting big money out of politics.

**[Grassroots supporters like you are key in the fight for a constitutional amendment to overturn _Citizens United_. Will you show your support?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d636/53d9897e/536fd0b2/1c89b428/835866485/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/OverturnCitizensUnited/?code=Warner")**

Thank you,

Team Warner | ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d636/53d9897e/536fd0b2/1c89b417/835866485/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ1NyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200211db__457__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")****
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d636/53d9897e/536fd0b2/1c89b416/835866485/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: =?utf-8?Q?Quinn=20Kobrin=2C=20Communications=20Director?=
subject: An exclusive first look...
body:
Early voting starts a week from today.

Good morning Peter,
My name is Quinn Kobrin, and I am the Communications Director for the Marc Flores for Congress campaign.

I want to thank you for all of your support and generosity so far. Thanks to you, we have been able to run a campaign that I have been proud to be a part of.

Early Voting
As you probably know, early voting starts a week from today, on February 18th, 2020.

As a treat for your continued support, I wanted you to have an exclusive look at our brand new mailers, which we will be sending out over the next few weeks.
http://marcfloresforcongress.com?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=5691415260-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_11_12_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-5691415260-32267927
http://marcfloresforcongress.com?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=5691415260-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_11_12_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-5691415260-32267927
Thanks to our dedicated staff and creative team, we were able to put these quality mailers together. We want to send them out to as many people as possible, so that voters in every corner of the district know who Marc is and what he stands for. To do this, we'll need your help.

It costs roughly 50 cents to print and mail a single mailer. In order to reach as many people as possible, I'm asking you to donate $20 (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=5691415260-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_11_12_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-5691415260-32267927) to send out 10 mailers right now.

Send 10 mailers in my name! (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=5691415260-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_11_12_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-5691415260-32267927)
Other ways to help out...
As you know, one of the most important parts of a campaign is to Get Out the Vote. We need to reach the thousands of Democratic voters in District 18, and we can't do it alone.
https://facebook.com/events/s/phone-bank-i-marc-flores-for-c/1335450426638925/?ti=icl&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=5691415260-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_11_12_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-5691415260-32267927
We will be working on voter outreach nonstop over the next few weeks. Any time you are able to help, simply sign up here (https://facebook.com/events/s/phone-bank-i-marc-flores-for-c/1335450426638925/?ti=icl&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=5691415260-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_11_12_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-5691415260-32267927) , and we'll schedule your shift!
Phone Bank This Thursday (https://www.facebook.com/events/1335450426638925/?acontext=%7B%22ref%22%3A2%2C%22ref_dashboard_filter%22%3A%22calendar%22%2C%22action_history%22%3A[%7B%22surface%22%3A%22dashboard%22%2C%22mechanism%22%3A%22main_list%22%2C%22extra_data%22%3A%22%5C%22%7B%5C%5C%5C%22dashboard_filter%5C%5C%5C%22%3A%5C%5C%5C%22upcoming%5C%5C%5C%22%7D%5C%22%22%7D%2C%7B%22surface%22%3A%22events_admin_tool%22%2C%22mechanism%22%3A%22events_admin_tool%22%2C%22extra_data%22%3A%22%22%7D]%2C%22has_source%22%3Atrue%7D&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=5691415260-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_11_12_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-5691415260-32267927)

Express Donate: $5 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=5691415260-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_11_12_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-5691415260-32267927)

Express Donate: $10 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=5691415260-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_11_12_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-5691415260-32267927)

Express Donate: $25 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=5691415260-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_11_12_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-5691415260-32267927)

Or, donate another amount (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?refcode=express_lane_other&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=5691415260-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_11_12_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-5691415260-32267927)

Thank you for all that you've done to keep our campaign moving forward so far. We would not be where we are if it weren't for you.

Thank you,

Quinn Kobrin
Communications Director
Marc Flores for Congress

clean_body: Early voting starts a week from today. Good morning Peter, My name is Quinn Kobrin, and I am the Communications Director for the Marc Flores for Congress campaign. I want to thank you for all of your support and generosity so far. Thanks to you, we have been able to run a campaign that I have been proud to be a part of. Early Voting As you probably know, early voting starts a week from today, on February 18th, 2020. As a treat for your continued support, I wanted you to have an exclusive look at our brand new mailers, which we will be sending out over the next few weeks. Thanks to our dedicated staff and creative team, we were able to put these quality mailers together. We want to send them out to as many people as possible, so that voters in every corner of the district know who Marc is and what he stands for. To do this, we'll need your help. It costs roughly 50 cents to print and mail a single mailer. In order to reach as many people as possible, I'm asking you to donate $20 () to send out 10 mailers right now. Send 10 mailers in my name! () Other ways to help out... As you know, one of the most important parts of a campaign is to Get Out the Vote. We need to reach the thousands of Democratic voters in District 18, and we can't do it alone. We will be working on voter outreach nonstop over the next few weeks. Any time you are able to help, simply sign up here () , and we'll schedule your shift! Phone Bank This Thursday () Express Donate: $5 () Express Donate: $10 () Express Donate: $25 () Or, donate another amount () Thank you for all that you've done to keep our campaign moving forward so far. We would not be where we are if it weren't for you. Thank you, Quinn Kobrin Communications Director Marc Flores for Congress ============================================================ Facebook () Facebook () Twitter () Twitter () Instagram () Instagram () Website () Website () Copyright © 2019 Marc Flores for Congress, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Marc Flores for Congress P.O. Box 924332 Houston, TX 77292 ** Add us to your address book ()

name: Team Ryan
subject: Help us meet our goal!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
A grassroots movement in every zip code of OH-13 | | Team, Our race is heating up, and there is so much at stake. Big-money special interests are pouring money into our district, trying to defeat our agenda for working families. We need to show them that we have the support of a grassroots movement made up of real Ohioans like you. **That 's why this month, we're trying to raise $1,000 from every zip code in OH-13. We just need $876 more from 18326 -- can you help us meet our goal? ** **[CONTRIBUTE](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bb6/5486deaa/3e23c8e1/dcb9836/4074783646/VEsH/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tim-ryan-2?refcode=200207_tr_zipcode_button&recurring=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+CONTRIBUTE&utm_campaign=200207_tr_zipcode&source=200207_tr_zipcode")** Tim is in Congress to fight for working families -- NOT lobbyists and corporations. That's why we rely on contributions like yours to fund our campaign. **[Pitch in today to help Tim keep fighting for the issues that matter most to our district, like good-paying jobs, more affordable health care, accessible higher education, and expanded Social Security.](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bb6/5486deaa/3e23c8e1/dcb9839/4074783646/VEsE/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tim-ryan-2?refcode=200207_tr_zipcode&recurring=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+Pitch+in+today+to+help+Tim+keep+fighting&utm_campaign=200207_tr_zipcode&source=200207_tr_zipcode")** Thank you for all you do, \-- Team Ryan ** ** ** **

* * *
---
| |
#
Meet Tim Ryan
---
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.
| | **Tim Ryan for Congress**
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
---
[](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bb6/5486deaa/3e23c8e1/dcb9838/4074783646/VEsF/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "http://facebook.com/timryanforamerica?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=200207_tr_zipcode&source=200207_tr_zipcode") [](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bb6/5486deaa/3e23c8e1/dcb983b/4074783646/VEsC/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://twitter.com/TimRyan?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=200207_tr_zipcode&source=200207_tr_zipcode")

The only way we can make sure Tim remains in Congress to fight for working families is through the efforts of grassroots supporters, volunteers, and donors. That's why Tim needs your help. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with Tim's top supporters. However, if you'd prefer to [receive fewer emails](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bb6/5486deaa/3e23c8e1/dcb983d/4074783646/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=6+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=200207_tr_zipcode&source=200207_tr_zipcode"), please click the link. If you would like to be taken off the list entirely, you can also [unsubscribe.](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bb6/5486deaa/3e23c8e1/dcb983c/4074783646/VEsB/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://timryan.bsd.net/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=7+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=200207_tr_zipcode&source=200207_tr_zipcode") Usually no one reads this far, so good on you! From Tim and all of us at Team Ryan, thank you!

name: My Faith Votes
subject: Election Watch: Buttigieg on the Bible, Abortion, and Trusting Women
body:
| | Keeping Christian voters informed on important election developments!
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ieBy60TvLGnOIGi3DxU1rjlS2gfivznXOo2VQj2oHvWUcu6DrANLDkODcRAqb8Z-ykjIYHuuFOuOUqUrbSU4PhY&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200211com01&n=1)
| Peter, The Iowa caucuses did not go as expected. Vote counting troubles aside, it was supposed to be Bernie Sanders and Joe Biden neck and neck in the race. That was only half right. It turns out it was Bernie Sanders and Pete Buttigieg instead (pronounced “buddah-judge”). Joe Biden came in a distant fourth and may be in trouble. It makes me wonder if the focus on impeachment this past month actually ended up hurting Joe Biden more than it did the President. Perhaps some Democrats were scared off by the Ukraine scandal and preferred a candidate that wouldn’t have to deal with that in the general election. I don’t know that we can ever be sure, but it seems plausible at least. Now, as the next state, New Hampshire, heads out to vote today (Tuesday, February 11), Pete Buttigieg is suddenly surging in the latest polls there as well. He even leads the early delegate count with 13 to Bernie Sanders’ 12. Will he be the “non-socialist” alternative to Sanders, rather than Joe Biden? If so, who is Pete Buttigieg anyway? [continue reading...](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ieBy60TvLGnOIGi3DxU1rjlS2gfivznXOo2VQj2oHvWUcu6DrANLDkODcRAqb8Z-ygKRYE0E-22NOhbeGbISyQQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200211com01&n=2) [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ieBy60TvLGnOIGi3DxU1rjlS2gfivznXOo2VQj2oHvWUcu6DrANLDkODcRAqb8Z-ygKRYE0E-22NOhbeGbISyQQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200211com01&n=3) **United. We Stand.** [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200211com01&n=4)
---

body:
The U.S. Immigration system is broken. Mike has a plan to fix it.

| [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=6d4115adbab84a56ace7ab5f768149cf&_e=yNKrwx0fSE8CvQFntwPkTJD_JRZndV3xGpYAgOK4IKE9NClR7_p-YoyjNIvEZfp67vdeDojA8P25BvuZn_WY9MUJWgta1_uShrnCNlFT21gTDKF5cv_sT2fbzOJfkvY9Lavzq6mluKj-MhGa4IfZ08oC182u2fhDbCusa2WBQUAEncV8O0KCFHf9WndTkyyAq7V3xEnH6tcrgrbNncmk8xabuiWPf3bm8q1HqJffBD1a0-9uySMVO93a1UlSswZaUwSDMq-vILBBmfh8TwxC6DfTX6MzWgZy0QRPaRpQUozUg3j4yghb6eO4nZP1tBDyflgPhmcvpj2ziXFTgpVH4gzVTKaxMHqRL5Wn6GWeykis34i9IaV7ThMFdY4VBQAvdUM9omS7jz4hhR6413Hg01Ms5J_sSF0Q3Jl-FtiquBhqpKaA1aJpMZEigK2Dr08UfKfsoLvaL3lk-ZzMEgThM2AT2nQ3t1bmwz7TlIA3LDWdPIW14NrikAqt3h96ueUhu_dEGklZLBRoQS4Wp3TVJ7OW7Fcs1LUVFxJ9E3yxfezMmjTqhpJQ8sclDj1CAviJX3ZUNoe6WgYSLduQJAYB91RbMG-MFG9qdv1gTRY2YTP2h0j3IGR94lvuszy_KLxDAnlbmQw0B4vamO4reMF5-SZjja6r92YNVx25vCx4m_0CElXcpgFjXYlpmvDb4POrLkHJ1HIHeyvJvXwi9gzDerhqQVaiwWTvdB5h5EXMEFiLaYXjeVOTTkg-IA7OfMVe) People on both sides of the political aisle agree that the U.S. immigration system is broken. But the Trump administration’s policies are ineffective, wasteful, and cruel -- separating families, caging children, and rescinding protections for Dreamers. **As president, Mike will restore American values and end the inhumane practices championed by President Trump.** Mike's comprehensive immigration plan will protect Dreamers, end family separation at the border, and rescind the travel ban. The plan modernizes ports of entry and implements sensible enforcement priorities that will protect national security while also welcoming immigrants. His plan opens America’s doors to the immigrants our economy needs, giving new Americans and their neighbors the tools they need to thrive. President Trump tweets a LOT about our immigration system -- and of course, his “beautiful wall” -- but offers nothing but fear mongering and hate. That’s why today, we want your help tweeting out a more positive vision. [**Click here to send a tweet about Mike’s plan and spread the word about an actual _solution_ to make immigration work for America’s economy and communities! **](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=6d4115adbab84a56ace7ab5f768149cf&_e=yNKrwx0fSE8CvQFntwPkTJD_JRZndV3xGpYAgOK4IKE9NClR7_p-YoyjNIvEZfp67vdeDojA8P25BvuZn_WY9MUJWgta1_uShrnCNlFT21gTDKF5cv_sT2fbzOJfkvY9Lavzq6mluKj-MhGa4IfZ08oC182u2fhDbCusa2WBQUAEncV8O0KCFHf9WndTkyyAq7V3xEnH6tcrgrbNncmk8xabuiWPf3bm8q1HqJffBD1a0-9uySMVO93a1UlSswZaUwSDMq-vILBBmfh8TwxC6DfTX6MzWgZy0QRPaRpQUozUg3j4yghb6eO4nZP1tBDyflgPhmcvpj2ziXFTgpVH4gzVTKaxMHqRL5Wn6GWeykis34i9IaV7ThMFdY4VBQAvdUM9omS7jz4hhR6413Hg01Ms5J_sSF0Q3Jl-FtiquBhqpKaA1aJpMZEigK2Dr08UfKfsoLvaL3lk-ZzMEgThM2AT2nQ3t1bmwz7TlIA3LDWdPIW14NrikAqt3h96ueUhu_dEGklZLBRoQS4Wp3TVJ7OW7Fcs1LUVFxJ9E3yxfew71YQz1s3X4ZE_y-xouS8PKDCSRnYztoG3tJGL1-X24DKi62be5xRxQfoOhjjfXfshPTd5hszYSXBF8UCfTNpE3EM8JNCFLOFSgHVGPO9k_n3YN_wkqa2QwvM1U6k5WFFi8iTYv_PQtMomniWnLOsOAkclpNgmfuTGGqTi7hhfCkloippCsXpFLl62fHcuJSOhJpjSpdl8vtQvIxUp0j90) Thanks for helping us make a change. clean_body: The U.S. Immigration system is broken. Mike has a plan to fix it. | People on both sides of the political aisle agree that the U.S. immigration system is broken. But the Trump administration’s policies are ineffective, wasteful, and cruel -- separating families, caging children, and rescinding protections for Dreamers. As president, Mike will restore American values and end the inhumane practices championed by President Trump. Mike's comprehensive immigration plan will protect Dreamers, end family separation at the border, and rescind the travel ban. The plan modernizes ports of entry and implements sensible enforcement priorities that will protect national security while also welcoming immigrants. His plan opens America’s doors to the immigrants our economy needs, giving new Americans and their neighbors the tools they need to thrive. President Trump tweets a LOT about our immigration system -- and of course, his “beautiful wall” -- but offers nothing but fear mongering and hate. That’s why today, we want your help tweeting out a more positive vision. Thanks for helping us make a change. Team Bloomberg 2020 | | | | ---|---|--- . Paid for by Mike Bloomberg 2020 All content © 2020. All rights reserved.

name: Representative Ayanna Pressley
subject: Why I'm endorsing Mondaire Jones
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
Today, I’m endorsing activist and attorney Mondaire Jones, a bold progressive who will fight for big, structural changes on behalf of New York’s 17th Congressional District. | | |
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/4AA/ni0YAA/t.2z6/VVEz3vKQRYy8kt_RYiVHvg/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3HzqwRIc8ctk0G-2B84LyI4ptr1FZgOUwMHXR7BfqLPmsOwPJpfMrFCZvnYopbISW-2FKFBxPXrzsUr0DQbbvJuc0XuZsPUNSA2ssqShQQ1Mn07EF5PxG2YojscLHbyKiiNtmAemhaSJj1Lu19SHpm-2FOvTjsRhEZjHWgksktx4WL4MuQlFzt4Wsp-2F6bto-2B5eSCB39qvCs4ZQp-2BaoRVTebNZtlVRyxf6wl4dUn-2BVT817yXKS9PMY0-3D/M4o4)
Friend, **** **** **** Today, I’m endorsing activist and attorney Mondaire Jones, a bold progressive who will fight for big, structural changes on behalf of New York’s 17th Congressional District. Mondaire was born and raised in his district, in the Village of Spring Valley, and he knows what it’s like to struggle in a small, working-class community. He knows what it’s like to live in Section 8 housing and on food stamps, and most importantly, he understands the urgent need for bold, progressive change.
We need leaders who will not only move the conversation forward, but will uplift the voices of those who have been left out and left behind. I know that Mondaire will do just that, which is why I’m supporting him in his race for Congress. **_[Will you join me in supporting Mondaire Jones by making a donation today?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/4AA/ni0YAA/t.2z6/VVEz3vKQRYy8kt_RYiVHvg/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKQCXz5P-2FyIcZdpfQWjIj3ZqSwgn5Ndi3SWN88Em-2B6p-2Fz9G5tHu2AIiZZwGChrotZ5zSCQiEJ8EXR3bVGiEX8HU3Ar0anDbYE1NHrCdR9d6Ll647aHWEgNKZnz4sq3VO61udaibG6RQ-2FOhWdH2foQQYR59xUN4QTISs39QwYfGtSxoUI9n5NFDHIUUnpyEI8WmPdIUnaNWSqsQgrpdEHHP6/1LJr)_**
[Donate](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/4AA/ni0YAA/t.2z6/VVEz3vKQRYy8kt_RYiVHvg/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKQCXz5P-2FyIcZdpfQWjIj3Zu61RupmCILksMr-2By1cyGsGwDhzkDZ5pvy6w0TMVI-2BjXLDNPUc0zpjoI6H-2BXww-2FzYW5WYeDXHxT00nH7bjoMmUCiWshlmwmHv7V-2FOA-2BUyafdaz6-2BIDlvjMe3NBM3MKmCMP1nwsq5-2BEeo350mPz6wFgFwqxMuAgPGRmh87zbrlsWsggSIuyedLFaeD6t-2FYX69Y/J9ag)
Now, I know a thing or two about shattering concrete ceilings. When he’s elected, Mondaire will be the first openly gay, black member of Congress in U.S. history. He’ll bring the totality of his lived experience with him to the halls of power. He’ll make space for others and help ensure that, in our democracy, everyone is represented. With support from folks just like you, we can make history, **_[so chip in today.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/4AA/ni0YAA/t.2z6/VVEz3vKQRYy8kt_RYiVHvg/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKQCXz5P-2FyIcZdpfQWjIj3ZikdcYCw-2FmX0moO-2FIjUzvEodFHrI5iBrBgB-2FeEl0QiDLm-2FLtJeL9lkObfJDocubMtugcbTQxEiG5dcPeg66xDdS9GvEIoUCnjStaP1LqnowmXhLoRoBQgBr3m7WM0qO1QnU6dfGM0JPaUiQ3dt8HR48F7v2iHhnBm3CFCTm9yYmi7EExm3cvOfalm-2FOAQJtM9/4hGJ)_**
Since the start of his campaign, Mondaire has built a grassroots, people-powered campaign with hundreds of volunteers and with supporters like you. With only a few months to go, Mondaire needs to get his bold, progressive message out to every voter in NY-17, and he needs our support to do it. **_[I hope you'll join me in supporting Mondaire today.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/4AA/ni0YAA/t.2z6/VVEz3vKQRYy8kt_RYiVHvg/h4/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKQCXz5P-2FyIcZdpfQWjIj3ZMb42GfcF6BuUujEq1k4eXkoWCyKloXmg6PVYCbyv9KKoQ6H-2BrtHpmaefSBm6iWWDePW-2BcDsgre-2BaHpKky0IX2x0vBvDDLL2tcNttsGU8sspyusLErHO5-2Fr1kkdoAKYT2UJxUCnD1R5KNVpKh2tfoTkxlETLgdgIUM-2F6EBt791ZvGfTETwyhGdS-2FHwpIlp6xC/z8UT)_**

clean_body: Today, I’m endorsing activist and attorney Mondaire Jones, a bold progressive who will fight for big, structural changes on behalf of New York’s 17th Congressional District. | | | Friend, ** Today, I’m endorsing activist and attorney Mondaire Jones, a bold progressive who will fight for big, structural changes on behalf of New York’s 17th Congressional District. Mondaire was born and raised in his district, in the Village of Spring Valley, and he knows what it’s like to struggle in a small, working-class community. He knows what it’s like to live in Section 8 housing and on food stamps, and most importantly, he understands the urgent need for bold, progressive change. We need leaders who will not only move the conversation forward, but will uplift the voices of those who have been left out and left behind. I know that Mondaire will do just that, which is why I’m supporting him in his race for Congress. Now, I know a thing or two about shattering concrete ceilings. When he’s elected, Mondaire will be the first openly gay, black member of Congress in U.S. history. He’ll bring the totality of his lived experience with him to the halls of power. He’ll make space for others and help ensure that, in our democracy, everyone is represented. With support from folks just like you, we can make history, Since the start of his campaign, Mondaire has built a grassroots, people-powered campaign with hundreds of volunteers and with supporters like you. With only a few months to go, Mondaire needs to get his bold, progressive message out to every voter in NY-17, and he needs our support to do it. ** In solidarity, Representative Ayanna Pressley | | - Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Our mailing address is: Mondaire for Congress P.O. Box 933, Nyack, NY 10960 | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Mondaire for Congress, please .

name: Dan Lipinski
subject: Breaking News
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LIPINSKI FOR CONGRESS
body:
Dear Peter :

I am extremely proud to share the news that I have been endorsed by the largest unions representing Chicago police officers and firefighters. The Chicago Fraternal Order of Police Lodge 7 and the Chicago Fire Fighters Union Local 2 represent more than 13,000 rank and file members as well as department retirees. I have also been endorsed by the Associated Fire Fighters of Illinois. I am extremely honored to receive this support.

The men and women who serve and protect make up the fabric of our communities and I never forget or take for granted their selfless dedication to public safety. In addition to the extreme challenges they face on the job each and every day, our law enforcement officers and first responders are facing unprecedented scrutiny.

My opponent in this race is backed by far-left extremists who embrace a radical agenda that we cannot afford. Her campaign is out of touch with the hard-working families of Illinois' Third District. Please join our public safety community in supporting my reelection to Congress by spreading the word to your family and friends to vote for commonsense leadership that values public service and reflects the real priorities and principles of the hard-working families of Illinois’ Third District.

Please consider making a donation today to help ensure that I can take my commonsense message to each and every corner of our district. Any donation, great or small, is sincerely appreciated.

secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-website-button?refcode=website&amount=20 [secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-website-button?refcode=website&amount=20]

Dan

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: President Trump's campaign was working to get Collins on the ballot during the impeachment trial
body:
Our team just got word...

Friends,
**Our team just learned that during the impeachment trial, members of President Trump 's campaign staff were in Maine collecting signatures to help Susan Collins get on the ballot.**
We're not surprised -- after all, one of Collins' staffers openly admitted her re-election campaign had been "working very closely" with the Trump administration.
Look, Trump is all in to reelect Susan Collins, and so is Mitch McConnell. He's already poured millions into her campaign so he can maintain his Senate Majority.
**Sara simply can 't take them on alone. The stakes are too high -- this race could determine control of the Senate! Sara needs our help:**
**[Will you make a contribution to support our campaign to defeat Susan Collins right now?](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802949/4bef7a87/6d21fb01/287fba33/859693620/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMTEtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200211-1-full")**
A gift of $3 would help us get closer to our largest fundraising goal yet (_one million dollars!!!_) but chip in whatever you can afford.
Please, we're counting on you to help us fight back against Donald Trump's efforts to help Senator Collins.
Keep fighting,
Team Sara

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: The latest attempt to stop me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011gQR_iP-nGBCUaNmUc6q17Y-uzI2QUrHFvj2dVhlS8-O1cyb6SNj4BGRCiRbkpE6mAqlGykNcXTRIjcFuc-SSwt2QJg3B7DdAoMmOwit5aVofzL9T2YV9ZkmagLuXBqurBZEhfstlBYVjXFG53yAHZvPYQQyfzo0X3Vur1DXA0U=&c=UaTsPnlgZ5BlHXHg80_-q4x5QeQo_wS5rGxGXaL9dKQPU2ssOmWVeA==&ch=AMu5-ZgtuD1n6M_iEON_DEabzm7M_ng_9k6jWu5Ll6asMAMxG7Sb5w==)
---
| Patriot,
I am on high alert after the Left's latest attempt to silence me. This time, Miami Democrats have crossed the line and filed a bar complaint against me for leading my Republican colleagues into Adam Schiff's secret, closed-door impeachment hearings back in October 2019.
They are seriously upset that I attempted to shed light on the sham impeachment process.

subject: What will happen tonight?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
No matter who comes out on top tonight in the New Hampshire primary, Jeanne Shaheen is sure to embrace their radical vision for America.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/831e5ed46a0b63b5/c2e9dcadd1b629aac3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, The New Hampshire Democratic Primary election concludes tonight. Whichever awful candidate wins, we know that Jeanne Shaheen will adopt their radical platform lock, stock, and barrel. And after tonight, it’s “all eyes on us” to defeat her. I’ve traveled across New Hampshire and I have personally witnessed the President's strong momentum and support. But I also saw how the Democrat campaigns are being propped up by outside dark money. [ Donate Now ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/831e5ed46a0b63b5/3a54d617977f30cfc3d6b838967d376c/33153) No matter how successful our President’s policies are or how much they’ve helped Granite Staters, Jeanne Shaheen and the Democrat Presidential candidates never miss an opportunity to attack. Peter, the stakes have never been higher. [**We cannot let up if we are to win in November**.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/831e5ed46a0b63b5/0459448bf3a27108c3d6b838967d376c/33153) While it’ll be interesting to see who ends up being the Democrat candidate, all of them are running on a radical, socialist agenda, instead of one that works for American families and workers. For America,

Corky Messner [ Donate Now ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/831e5ed46a0b63b5/90d08a526cfd0abcc3d6b838967d376c/33153) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/831e5ed46a0b63b5/b46807e7a51ee642c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/831e5ed46a0b63b5/86bf5efe439eaf49c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

---
Hey Peter,

I want to thank you -- let me tell you why. As we get closer and closer to the Texas primary, this campaign is the strongest it's ever been. That's 100% because of people like you.

You've helped us build a solid foundation that will be a key factor in our victory. But our work is far from over. Now that we have that foundation, **it 's time to scale up to kick this primary's ass** and go on to defeat Senator Cornyn in November.

That's where our $75,000 goal comes in. Wednesday is the last FEC filing deadline before primary voting starts and we need to go in STRONG. **[Pitch in to help us get to where we need to be>>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905f6/7f51f7bc/4d284df9/4ef04ca5/808265068/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg5NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-febfec?refcode=email_20200211.1nd__897__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

I'm exceptionally proud of how far we've come and the fact that we did it without taking a dime from corporate PACs. This campaign was built on the donations of more than 29,000 people who gave what they could when they could.

But we're going to have to do even better to finish this primary in the strongest possible position. We need to reach undecided voters and show them why this is the campaign that can put Texas' Senate seat back in the hands of the people. I won't lie -- that takes resources. And I'm counting on you.

**If you want to win in November, I hope you 'll take a minute to give today. Let's keep our incredible momentum going!**
